sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100668" key="suni/eros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνίερ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n100668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having joint sacrifices</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.753f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
